page.config:
Kreator eksportu/importu (Wybor pól) #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
#define CTRLID_KONTRAHENCI 2001 #define CTRLID_PRODUKTY 2002 #define CTRLID_PRACOWNICY 2003 #define CTRLID_RECEPTY 2004 #define CTRLID_SRTRW 2005
#define CTRLID_PLAT_SALDO_CHK 2011 #define CTRLID_PLAT_SALDO_DATE 2012
#define CTRLID_PLAT_OP_CHK 2021 #define CTRLID_PLAT_OP_DATE_BEG 2022 #define CTRLID_PLAT_OP_DATE_END 2023
#define CTRLID_MAG_SALDO_CHK 2031 #define CTRLID_MAG_SALDO_DATE 2032
#define CTRLID_MAG_OP_CHK 2041 #define CTRLID_MAG_OP_DATE_BEG 2042 #define CTRLID_MAG_OP_DATE_END 2043
#define CTRLID_SALE_CHK 2051 #define CTRLID_SALE_DATE_BEG 2052 #define CTRLID_SALE_DATE_END 2053
#define CTRLID_ACCT_BO_CHK 2061 #define CTRLID_ACCT_BO_DATE 2062
#define CTRLID_ACCT_OP_CHK 2071 #define CTRLID_ACCT_OP_DATE_BEG 2072 #define CTRLID_ACCT_OP_DATE_END 2073
#define CTRLID_ACCT_KONTA_CHK 2081 #define CTRLID_ACCT_KONTA_SYMB 2082
#define CTRLID_PURCH_CHK 2091 #define CTRLID_PURCH_DATE_BEG 2092 #define CTRLID_PURCH_DATE_END 2093
#define CTRLID_TRANS_SALDO_CHK 2101 #define CTRLID_TRANS_SALDO_DATE 2102
#define CTRLID_COSTPURCH_CHK 2111 #define CTRLID_COSTPURCH_DATE_BEG 2112 #define CTRLID_COSTPURCH_DATE_END 2113
#define CTRLID_PAR_CHK 2114 #define CTRLID_PAR_DATE_BEG 2115 #define CTRLID_PAR_DATE_END 2116
#define CTRLID_UPDATE_EXISTING 3000
#define CTRLID_CHECK_CUSTOMREDIRECT 100 #define CTRLID_EDIT_KONTO_LIKE 101 #define CTRLID_MAG_DATAOD 102 #define CTRLID_MAG_DATADO 103 #define CTRLID_DOWKSIEG_DATADO 104 #define CTRLID_FAKTURY_DATADO 105 #define CTRLID_WPISKASBANK_DATAOD 106 #define CTRLID_KLIENCISPRZED 107 #define CTRLID_KLIENCISPRZED_CHECKBOX 108 #define CTRLID_MAG_DATADO_GROUP 109 #define CTRLID_MAG_DATAOD_GROUP 110 #define CTRLID_DOWKSIEG_DATADO_GROUP 111 #define CTRLID_FAKTURY_DATADO_GROUP 112 #define CTRLID_PLATNOSCI_DATADO_GROUP 113 #define CTRLID_KONTA_GROUP 114 #define CTRLID_CHECKBOX_WHOLE_TABLE 115
#define CTRLID_RADIO_SCHEMAS 116
#define PROP_OBJ1_TYPEID 100 #define PROP_OBJ2_TYPEID 101 #define PROP_PARAM1 102 #define PROP_PARAM2 103 #define PROP_ONCHANGE_FUNCTION 104
#if appvarImportKind = IMPXML #define PICTUREID PICTURE_WIZZARD_IMP_XML_STEP2 #define TITLE_TEXT Co importować #define DESC_TEXT Wybierz typ danych (obiekty) jakie mają zostać zaimportowane
#define ON_LOCALITIES def #define ON_DOCSTYPES def #define ON_PROVINCES def #define ON_PRODUCTS def #endif
#if appvarImportKind = IMPFRM #define PICTUREID PICTURE_WIZZARD_IMP_FRM_STEP2 #define TITLE_TEXT Co importować #define DESC_TEXT Określ jakie dane mają zostać zaimportowane
#define NEW_FIRMA_IMPORT #endif
#if appvarImportKind = IMPXLS #define PICTUREID PICTURE_WIZZARD_IMP_XLS_STEP2 #define TITLE_TEXT Co importować #define DESC_TEXT Wybierz typ danych (obiekty) jakie mają zostać wyeksportowane
#define ON_UNITS def #define ON_COUNTIES def #define ON_LOCALITIES def #define ON_DOCSTYPES def #define ON_PROVINCES def #define ON_CUSTOMERS def #define ON_PRODUCTS def #define ON_ACCOUNTS def #define ON_DOKMAG_XLS def #define ON_GRUPYPROD_XLS def #define ON_BO_TRANS_XLS def #define ON_BO_KONTO_XLS def #define ON_DOWODKSIEG_XLS def #define ON_PRACOWNICY_XSL def #define ON_ZLECPROD_XLS def #define ON_ZAM_XLS def #ifdef APPCONFIG_IMPORT_CENNIKI #define ON_CENNIKI_XLS def #endif #define ON_RECEPTY_XLS def #define ON_CENYKARTOTEKOWE_XLS def #ifdef _HJORT #define ON_BO_PLAC def #endif
#ifdef _ALMA_TREND #define ON_POJAZDY def #endif
#endif
#if appvarImportKind = EXPXML #define PICTUREID PICTURE_WIZZARD_EXP_XML_STEP2 #define TITLE_TEXT Co eksportować ? #define DESC_TEXT Wybierz z poniższej listy jakie dane chcesz eksportować:
#endif
#if appvarImportKind = IMPEXT #define PICTUREID PICTURE_WIZZARD_IMP_EXT_STEP1 #define TITLE_TEXT Co importować #define DESC_TEXT Wybierz typ danych (obiekty) jakie mają zostać wyeksportowane
#define ON_LOCALITIES def #define ON_DEPARTMENTS def #endif
center
#include "50209" #include "50203" #include "50516" #include "50126"
'--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Pobiera nazwe z pierwszego <t> z checkbox'a '--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- private function getTextFromCheckbox(byref pCheckbox): getTextFromCheckbox = "" dim pElement for each pElement in pCheckbox if (pElement.type = CTRL_TYPE_STATIC) then getTextFromCheckbox = pElement.text end if next end function
'--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Na wcisniecie checkbox'a dla denego typeid '--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- private function Checkbox_OnDataEntered(byref oCtrl, byval nTypeID, byval newValue, byval bAdd2Summary, byval strParam)
dim pItemsArr set pItemsArr = container().m_pItems
dim i: i = 0 dim pItem
'Dodaj nowy element do tablicy jeżeli nie ma dim bExists bExists = false
for i=0 to pItemsArr.UpperIndex() set pItem = pItemsArr.Value(i)
if (pItem.m_nTypeID = nTypeID and _ ((strParam = pItem.m_strParam1 and strParam<>"") or (strParam="")) ) then bExists = true exit for end if next
'Pobieramy nazwe funkcji dim strFunctionOnChange: strFunctionOnChange = "" if (oCtrl.userprop.exists(PROP_ONCHANGE_FUNCTION)) then strFunctionOnChange = oCtrl.userprop.prop(PROP_ONCHANGE_FUNCTION) end if
'Pobierz wsk. do dodatkowej funkcji obslugujacej przycisniecia dim pfnFunctionOnChange: set pfnFunctionOnChange = nothing if (strFunctionOnChange<>"") then set pfnFunctionOnChange = getref(strFunctionOnChange) end if
if (newValue="1") then if (not bExists) then 'Dodaj nowy bo ma istniec
dim pNewItem set pNewItem = container().NewItemToImport()
pNewItem.m_nTypeID = nTypeID pNewItem.m_strName = getTextFromCheckbox(oCtrl)
if (strParam<>"") then pNewItem.m_strParam1 = strParam end if
pNewItem.bDisplay = bAdd2Summary
if (not pfnFunctionOnChange is nothing) then pfnFunctionOnChange pNewItem end if
end if else if (bExists) then 'Usun bo ma go nie być pItemsArr.Remove i
if (not pfnFunctionOnChange is nothing) then pfnFunctionOnChange nothing end if end if end if
end function
'--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Na zmiane wartości, któregoś z checkbox'ów '--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- function c##CTRLID_CHECK_CUSTOMREDIRECT##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue) dim nTypeID nTypeID = oCtrl.userprop.prop(PROP_OBJ1_TYPEID)
dim strParam: strParam = "" if (oCtrl.userprop.exists(PROP_PARAM1)) then strParam = oCtrl.userprop.prop(PROP_PARAM1) end if
'Dodanie lub usuniecie informacji o pierwszym typeid Checkbox_OnDataEntered oCtrl, nTypeID, newValue, true, strParam
'Jezeli jeden checkbox to dodanie 2'ch obiektow to robimy to if (oCtrl.userprop.exists(PROP_OBJ2_TYPEID)) then
if (oCtrl.userprop.prop(PROP_OBJ2_TYPEID)>0) then strParam = "" if (oCtrl.userprop.exists(PROP_PARAM2)) then strParam = oCtrl.userprop.prop(PROP_PARAM2) end if
nTypeID = oCtrl.userprop.prop(PROP_OBJ2_TYPEID) Checkbox_OnDataEntered oCtrl, nTypeID, newValue, false, strParam end if end if
c##CTRLID_CHECK_CUSTOMREDIRECT##_ondataentered = true end function
'--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Na pobranie wartości checkbox'a przez system '--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- function c##CTRLID_CHECK_CUSTOMREDIRECT##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl)
dim nTypeID nTypeID = oCtrl.userprop.prop(PROP_OBJ1_TYPEID)
dim strParam: strParam = "" if (oCtrl.userprop.exists(PROP_PARAM1)) then strParam = oCtrl.userprop.prop(PROP_PARAM1) end if
dim strFunctionOnChange: strFunctionOnChange = "" if (oCtrl.userprop.exists(PROP_ONCHANGE_FUNCTION)) then strFunctionOnChange = oCtrl.userprop.prop(PROP_ONCHANGE_FUNCTION) end if
'Pobierz wsk. do dodatkowej funkcji obslugujacej przycisniecia dim pfnFunctionOnChange: set pfnFunctionOnChange = nothing if (strFunctionOnChange<>"") then set pfnFunctionOnChange = getref(strFunctionOnChange) end if
dim pItemsArr set pItemsArr = container().m_pItems
dim bExists: bExists = false
dim i for i=0 to pItemsArr.UpperIndex() dim pItem set pItem = pItemsArr.Value(i)
if (pItem.m_nTypeID = nTypeID and _ ((strParam = pItem.m_strParam1 and strParam<>"") or (strParam="")) ) then bExists = true exit for end if next
if (bExists) then oCtrl.Value = "1"
if (not pfnFunctionOnChange is nothing) then pfnFunctionOnChange pItem end if
else oCtrl.Value = "0"
if (not pfnFunctionOnChange is nothing) then pfnFunctionOnChange nothing end if
end if
c##CTRLID_CHECK_CUSTOMREDIRECT##_ongetdata = true end function
'--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Zmiana wartości checkbox'a "Dok. magazynowe". Ustawiamy daty '--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- private function DokMag_OnChange(byref pImportItem) if (pImportItem is nothing) then page_.ctrl(CTRLID_MAG_DATADO_GROUP).hide = true page_.ctrl(CTRLID_MAG_DATAOD_GROUP).hide = true else page_.ctrl(CTRLID_MAG_DATADO_GROUP).hide = false page_.ctrl(CTRLID_MAG_DATAOD_GROUP).hide = false end if end function
'--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Zmiana wartości checkbox'a "Dow. księgowe". Ustawiamy daty '--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- private function DowKsieg_OnChange(byref pImportItem) if (pImportItem is nothing) then page_.ctrl(CTRLID_DOWKSIEG_DATADO_GROUP).hide = true else page_.ctrl(CTRLID_DOWKSIEG_DATADO_GROUP).hide = false end if end function
'--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Zmiana wartości checkbox'a "Faktury". Ustawiamy daty '--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- private function Faktury_OnChange(byref pImportItem) if (pImportItem is nothing) then page_.ctrl(CTRLID_FAKTURY_DATADO_GROUP).hide = true else page_.ctrl(CTRLID_FAKTURY_DATADO_GROUP).hide = false end if end function
'--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Zmiana wartości checkbox'a "Płatności". Ustawiamy daty '--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- private function Platnosci_OnChange(byref pImportItem) if (pImportItem is nothing) then page_.ctrl(CTRLID_PLATNOSCI_DATADO_GROUP).hide = true else page_.ctrl(CTRLID_PLATNOSCI_DATADO_GROUP).hide = false end if end function
'--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Zmiana wartości checkbox'a "Konta". Ustawiamy daty '--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- private function Konta_OnChange(byref pImportItem) if (pImportItem is nothing) then page_.ctrl(CTRLID_KONTA_GROUP).hide = true else page_.ctrl(CTRLID_KONTA_GROUP).hide = false end if end function
'--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Zmiana wartości checkbox'a "Klienci". Blokowanie, odblokowanie ' "tylko klienci sprzedażowi" '--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- private function Klienci_OnChange(byref pImportItem) #ifdef ON_CUSTOMERSSALE if (pImportItem is nothing) then page_.ctrl(CTRLID_KLIENCISPRZED).hide = true else page_.ctrl(CTRLID_KLIENCISPRZED).hide = false end if #endif end function
'--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Zanzaczenie lud odznaczenie wszystkich checkbox'ow '---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
#define MODE_ZAZNACZ 1 #define MODE_ODWRACAJ 2 #define MODE_ODZNACZAJ 3
function Select_CheckBoxes(byval nMode) dim pTableBody set pTableBody = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_CHECKBOX_WHOLE_TABLE).body
dim pRow for each pRow in pTableBody
dim pCell for each pCell in pRow
dim pElement for each pElement in pCell if (pElement.type = CTRL_TYPE_CHECKBOX) then if (not pElement.userprop is nothing) then
dim strValue: strValue = "0" if (nMode = MODE_ZAZNACZ) then strValue = "1" elseif (nMode = MODE_ODWRACAJ) then if (pElement.value="1") then strValue = "0" else strValue = "1" end if end if
pElement.value = strValue c##CTRLID_CHECK_CUSTOMREDIRECT##_ondataentered pElement, strValue end if end if next
next
next end function
function on_button_nothing() Select_CheckBoxes MODE_ODZNACZAJ end function
function on_button_all() Select_CheckBoxes MODE_ZAZNACZ end function
function on_button_reverse() Select_CheckBoxes MODE_ODWRACAJ end function
#if appvarImportKind = EXPXML
function c##CTRLID_RADIO_SCHEMAS##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue) container().m_nChoosenFilter = newValue - 1 end function function c##CTRLID_RADIO_SCHEMAS##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) page_.ctrl(CTRLID_RADIO_SCHEMAS).value = clng(container().m_nChoosenFilter + 1) end function
sub fill_schemas
dim iter for iter = 0 to container().m_oarrExpFilter.UpperIndex() page_.ctrl(CTRLID_RADIO_SCHEMAS).addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1).value = container().m_oarrExpFilter.Value(iter).nazwa next end sub #endif '--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Ustaw do kontenera importu informacje o parametrach podanych dat ' np. daty dla faktur. '--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- function fclose() 'Musimy przypisać jeszcze raz parametry podawane w kontrolkach 'ponieważ nie mamy na nich funkcji transferu
dim pItemsArr set pItemsArr = container().m_pItems
dim i: i = 0 for i=0 to pItemsArr.UpperIndex() dim pItem set pItem = pItemsArr.Value(i)
with pItem select case CLng(pItem.m_nTypeID) case TYPEID_N5DOKMAG .m_strParam1 = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_MAG_DATAOD).value .m_strParam2 = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_MAG_DATADO).value
#if appvarImportKind <> IMPXLS case TYPEID_N5DOWODKSIEG .m_strParam1 = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_DOWKSIEG_DATADO).value #endif
case TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ .m_strParam1 = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_FAKTURY_DATADO).value
case TYPEID_N5PLATNOSC .m_strParam1 = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_FAKTURY_DATADO).value
case TYPEID_N5KONTO if not page_.trygetctrl(CTRLID_EDIT_KONTO_LIKE) is nothing then .m_strParam1 = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_EDIT_KONTO_LIKE).value end if
end select end with
next end function
'--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Ustaw daty i zanzacz wszystkie checkbox'y dla szybkiego importu ' z Navo Firma '--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- function MiniImport_Firma() dim dLast2Months dLast2Months = DateSerial(Year(srvDate()), Month(srvDate())-2, Day(srvDate()))
page_.ctrl(CTRLID_FAKTURY_DATADO).value = dLast2Months page_.ctrl(CTRLID_WPISKASBANK_DATAOD).value = dLast2Months
'Zaznacz wszystkie checkbox'y on_button_all end function
'---------------------------------------------------------------- 'NEW_FIRMA_IMPORT '----------------------------------------------------------------
VBW_CHECKBOX_TRANSFER(CTRLID_KONTRAHENCI,NFIO.m_bCustomers) VBW_CHECKBOX_TRANSFER(CTRLID_PRODUKTY,NFIO.m_bProducts) VBW_CHECKBOX_TRANSFER(CTRLID_PRACOWNICY,NFIO.m_bEmployee) VBW_CHECKBOX_TRANSFER(CTRLID_RECEPTY,NFIO.m_bReceipt) VBW_CHECKBOX_TRANSFER(CTRLID_SRTRW,NFIO.m_bSrtrw)
VBW_CHECKBOX_TRANSFER(CTRLID_UPDATE_EXISTING,NFIO.m_bUpdateExisting)
VBW_CHECKBOX_TRANSFER(CTRLID_PLAT_SALDO_CHK,NFIO.m_bPaymentsBalance) VBW_CHECKBOX_TRANSFER(CTRLID_PLAT_SALDO_DATE,NFIO.m_dPaymentsBalanceDate)
VBW_CHECKBOX_TRANSFER(CTRLID_PLAT_OP_CHK,NFIO.m_bPayments) VBW_CHECKBOX_TRANSFER(CTRLID_PLAT_OP_DATE_BEG,NFIO.m_dPaymentsBeginDate) VBW_CHECKBOX_TRANSFER(CTRLID_PLAT_OP_DATE_END,NFIO.m_dPaymentsEndDate)
VBW_CHECKBOX_TRANSFER(CTRLID_MAG_SALDO_CHK,NFIO.m_bStoreBalance) VBW_CHECKBOX_TRANSFER(CTRLID_MAG_SALDO_DATE,NFIO.m_dStoreBalanceDate)
VBW_CHECKBOX_TRANSFER(CTRLID_MAG_OP_CHK,NFIO.m_bStoreOp) VBW_CHECKBOX_TRANSFER(CTRLID_MAG_OP_DATE_BEG,NFIO.m_dStoreOpBeginDate) VBW_CHECKBOX_TRANSFER(CTRLID_MAG_OP_DATE_END,NFIO.m_dStoreOpEndDate)
VBW_CHECKBOX_TRANSFER(CTRLID_SALE_CHK,NFIO.m_bSale) VBW_CHECKBOX_TRANSFER(CTRLID_SALE_DATE_BEG,NFIO.m_dSaleBeginDate) VBW_CHECKBOX_TRANSFER(CTRLID_SALE_DATE_END,NFIO.m_dSaleEndDate)
VBW_CHECKBOX_TRANSFER(CTRLID_PAR_CHK,NFIO.m_bPar) VBW_CHECKBOX_TRANSFER(CTRLID_PAR_DATE_BEG,NFIO.m_dParBeginDate) VBW_CHECKBOX_TRANSFER(CTRLID_PAR_DATE_END,NFIO.m_dParEndDate)
VBW_CHECKBOX_TRANSFER(CTRLID_PURCH_CHK,NFIO.m_bPurchase) VBW_CHECKBOX_TRANSFER(CTRLID_PURCH_DATE_BEG,NFIO.m_bPurchaseBeginDate) VBW_CHECKBOX_TRANSFER(CTRLID_PURCH_DATE_END,NFIO.m_bPurchaseEndDate)
VBW_CHECKBOX_TRANSFER(CTRLID_ACCT_BO_CHK,NFIO.m_bAccountBalance) VBW_CHECKBOX_TRANSFER(CTRLID_ACCT_BO_DATE,NFIO.m_dAccountBalanceDate)
VBW_CHECKBOX_TRANSFER(CTRLID_ACCT_OP_CHK,NFIO.m_bAccountOp) VBW_CHECKBOX_TRANSFER(CTRLID_ACCT_OP_DATE_BEG,NFIO.m_dAccountOpBeginDate) VBW_CHECKBOX_TRANSFER(CTRLID_ACCT_OP_DATE_END,NFIO.m_dAccountOpEndDate)
VBW_CHECKBOX_TRANSFER(CTRLID_ACCT_KONTA_CHK,NFIO.m_bAccounts) VBW_CHECKBOX_TRANSFER(CTRLID_ACCT_KONTA_SYMB,NFIO.m_strAccounts)
VBW_CHECKBOX_TRANSFER(CTRLID_TRANS_SALDO_CHK,NFIO.m_bTransactionBalance) VBW_CHECKBOX_TRANSFER(CTRLID_TRANS_SALDO_DATE,NFIO.m_dTransactionBalanceDate)
VBW_CHECKBOX_TRANSFER(CTRLID_COSTPURCH_CHK,NFIO.m_bCostPurch) VBW_CHECKBOX_TRANSFER(CTRLID_COSTPURCH_DATE_BEG,NFIO.m_dCostPurchBeginDate) VBW_CHECKBOX_TRANSFER(CTRLID_COSTPURCH_DATE_END,NFIO.m_dCostPurchEndDate) '----------------------------------------------------------------

table.name: t##CTRLID_CHECKBOX_WHOLE_TABLE
table.tbody:
TITLE_TEXT
DESC_TEXT

#if appvarImportKind = EXPXML
#endif XFORMMWIZZARDEND
